scripts.test: echo "Error: run tests from root" && exit 0
scripts.serve: node -e "if (!process.env.CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS) { console.error('\x1b[31mDont run serve directly, use one of the serve:* scripts\x1b[0m');process.exit(1);}" && webpack serve --config ./node_modules/@caweb/webpack/webpack.config.js ./node_modules/@caweb/webpack/tests/webpack.tests.js --merge
scripts.serve:delta: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme delta' npm run serve
scripts.serve:eureka: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme eureka' npm run serve
scripts.serve:mono: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme mono' npm run serve
scripts.serve:oceanside: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme oceanside' npm run serve
scripts.serve:orangecounty: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme orangecounty' npm run serve
scripts.serve:pasorobles: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme pasorobles' npm run serve
scripts.serve:sacramento: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme sacramento' npm run serve
scripts.serve:santabarbara: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme santabarbara' npm run serve
scripts.serve:santacruz: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme santacruz' npm run serve
scripts.serve:shasta: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme shasta' npm run serve
scripts.serve:sierra: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme sierra' npm run serve
scripts.serve:trinity: cross-env CAWEB_NODE_OPTIONS='--template ./patterns/default.html --scheme trinity' npm run serve
